title: chakam #2449
definition:
1) to be wise
    1a) (Qal) to be or become wise, act wisely
    1b) (Piel) to make wise, teach wisdom, instruct
    1c) (Pual) to be made wise
    1d) (Hiphil) to make wise
    1e) (Hithpael) to show oneself wise, deceive, show one's wisdom
nasbUsage:
